{{Quote|Now you will experience the power of the dark side.|Morathax|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Morathax''' was a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] living on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She organized many attacks against the [[Singing Mountain Clan]], the enemies of the Nightsisters.
